annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Idaho Code 28-22-104(1) — 12% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Idaho’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
